ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › OUR LOGO INTRODUCING The strong, recognizable typographic construction is easy to read, thanks to our THE ZONNIC LOGO, impactful navy blue logo, balanced by the circular halo which varies by colour based ALWAYS ICONIC. on the product's flavour profile. Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only. OUR ASSETS AND ELEMENTS OUR DESIGN SYSTEM 7 Do not show or remit this document to a third party.

ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › OUR LOGO LOGO ON GRADIENT BACKGROUND The circular halo around the C must always be set in the secondary colour within the gradient, which is associated to the product's flavour profile. The word ZONNIC must always be set in navy blue as it is our primary brand colour. We EXCLUSIVELY use the monochromatic option for Corporate & External communications & for diminished accessibility purposes. In all other cases, always use the colour ZONNIC. Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only. OUR ASSETS AND ELEMENTS OUR DESIGN SYSTEM 8 Do not show or remit this document to a third party.

ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › OUR LOGO LOGO ON GREY GRADIENT On a white background, the circular halo around the C must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours. In all instances, the word ZONNIC must be rendered in navy blue as it is our primary brand colour. Monochromatic option. Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only. OUR ASSETS AND ELEMENTS OUR DESIGN SYSTEM 9 Do not show or remit this document to a third party.

ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › OUR LOGO LOGO ON LIGHT IMAGES/ BACKGROUNDS On a light image background, the circular halo around the C must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours. In all instances, the word ZONNIC must be used in navy blue to ensure improved readability. Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only. OUR ASSETS AND ELEMENTS OUR DESIGN SYSTEM 10 Do not show or remit this document to a third party.

ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › OUR LOGO LOGO ON DARK IMAGES/ BACKGROUNDS On a dark image background, the circular halo around the C must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours. In all instances, the word ZONNIC must be used in white to ensure improved readability. Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only. OUR ASSETS AND ELEMENTS OUR DESIGN SYSTEM 11 Do not show or remit this document to a third party.

ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › OUR LOGO LOGO SAFETY ZONE The comms safety zone is 50% of the height of the C. Our logo should never be altered or recreated in any way. Be sure to respect the designated safety zone in order to create the desired impact and avoid disruption from other elements. SIZING OF OUR LOGO Our logo should never be used in a smaller font than the recommended minimum size. Print minimum height: 7 mm Screen minimum height: 20 px Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only. OUR ASSETS AND ELEMENTS OUR DESIGN SYSTEM 12 Do not show or remit this document to a third party.

ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › COLOURS AND GRADIENTS APPLYING BRAND 1 1 1 Primary COLOURS ACROSS Colour APPLICATIONS HERO FLAVOUR PRINCIPLES • Use the primary colour from the gradient (1) as the main visual cue for navigating the portfolio. • The secondary colour (2) should primarily appear on the side label halo “C” in packaging. It can also be used in bespoke MINT MINT MINT activations when paired with a primary white execution and accented with colour (2). 2 2 2 Secondary • For flavour-led assets, use either the Colour primary colour (1) or the full gradient (1 & 2) to clearly communicate the flavour profile. ZONNIC DESIGN GUIDELINES › TYPOGRAPHY ZONNIC'S FONT: Santral Black Santral Bold SANTRAL Aa Aa Why did we choose Santral as our primary typeface? Santral SemiBold Santral Book Aa Aa A straightforward simplicity that matches our communication style, it is also the main typography on our packaging. This allows cohesive branding across all communications. Santral is available in Black, Bold, SemiBold, and Book. Internal confidential document: For internal ITCAN use only.
